name: Gakujo Co., Ltd.
summary: Gakujo Co., Ltd. provides human resource and recruitment services in Japan. The company engages in the new graduate and mid-career recruitment, employment support, career change events, and job-hunting support activities. It also provides internship career support, training, and recruitment tool production services, as well as recruitment outsourcing and advertising services. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
